justification: The diff correctly updates Spring Boot to 3.x and Java to 21, migrating javax.servlet to jakarta.servlet and using String.formatted() (line 48 in DataController.java). However, it removes the @SpringBootApplication annotation and SpringApplication.run() call in HivereaderApplication.java without providing an alternative entry point, which breaks the application. The test migration to JUnit 5 is correct, but the removal of spring-boot-starter-jdbc and the addition of @DependsOnDatabaseInitialization suggest incomplete dependency management.
